title: Otolepis spectabilis
taxonomy: Otolepis spectabilis is a genus of plant in the family Rubiaceae. The genus is part of the larger family of flowering plants known as angiosperms, which also includes other plants in the order Gentianales. Further classification places Otolepis spectabilis within the order Gentianales, the suborder Gentianineae, and the family Rubiaceae. At the kingdom and division levels, Otolepis spectabilis falls under the kingdom Plantae and the division Magnoliophyta. This classification reflects the plant's unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
